title: Business Analyst
description:
Role/Job Title: Business Analyst/ Sr Business Analyst

Function/ Department: Information Technology




Job Purpose

To lead business analysis for finance and procurement transformation initiatives by optimizing procure‑to‑pay processes, enhancing ERP (Oracle/SAP) workflows, and ensuring compliance with GST, TDS, and banking integrations. The role enables efficient vendor management, accurate payment processing, and strong cross‑functional collaboration to support IDFC FIRST Bank’s operational and digital transformation goals.




Primary Skills

7 - 10 years as a Business Analyst on enterprise finance, procurement, or ERP transformation programmes
Proven hands-on experience with procure-to-pay (P2P) processes: purchase requisitions, purchase orders, goods receipt, invoice matching, and payment runs
Strong understanding of payment processing workflows including TDS deductions, advance/milestone-based payments, and bank integration (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS)
Experience working with Oracle EBS or a comparable ERP (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics) in a finance/AP/procurement context
Familiarity with Indian GST compliance: GSTIN validation, e-invoicing (IRN/IRP), GSTR filing, and ITC reconciliation
Demonstrated ability to define complex approval workflows, DOA matrices, and business rules for configurable systems
Experience with vendor management processes including onboarding, KYC, scoring, and contract management
Excellent stakeholder management skills with the ability to work across finance, procurement, compliance, and technology teams
Strong documentation skills: BRDs, FRDs, user stories, process maps (BPMN), and data flow diagrams




Secondary Skill




Experience with cloud-native or microservices-based platforms (Spring Boot, Kafka, React)
Exposure to OCR/AI-driven invoice processing or document extraction tools
CBAP, PMI-PBA, or equivalent BA certification
Experience with vendor portals or B2B self-service platforms
Prior involvement in MSME compliance, e-way bill integration, or government API integrations (GSTN GSP, Income Tax)




Education Qualification:

Graduation: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) / Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) / Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
Post-Graduation: Master of Science (M.Sc) /Master of Technology (M.Tech) / Master of Computer Applications (MCA)

description:

Advisory



Industry/Sector

Job Description & Summary
A career within Application and Emerging Technology services, will provide you with a unique opportunity to help our clients identify and prioritise emerging technologies that can help solve their business problems. We help clients design approaches to integrate new technologies, skills, and processes so they can get the most out of their technology investment and drive business results and innovation.


To really stand out and make us fit for the future in a constantly changing world, each and every one of us at PwC needs to be a purpose-led and values-driven leader at every level. To help us achieve this we have the PwC Professional; our global leadership development framework. It gives us a single set of expectations across our lines, geographies and career paths, and provides transparency on the skills we need as individuals to be successful and progress in our careers, now and in the future.

As a Senior Associate, you'll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution. PwC Professional skills and responsibilities for this management level include but are not limited to:



Use feedback and reflection to develop self awareness, personal strengths and address development areas.
Delegate to others to provide stretch opportunities, coaching them to deliver results.
Demonstrate critical thinking and the ability to bring order to unstructured problems.
Use a broad range of tools and techniques to extract insights from current industry or sector trends.
Review your work and that of others for quality, accuracy and relevance.
Know how and when to use tools available for a given situation and can explain the reasons for this choice.
Seek and embrace opportunities which give exposure to different situations, environments and perspectives.
Use straightforward communication, in a structured way, when influencing and connecting with others.
Able to read situations and modify behavior to build quality relationships.
Uphold the firm's code of ethics and business conduct.

title: Business Analyst (Power BI & SQL)
description:
Job Description – Business Analyst (Power BI & SQL)

Experience: 4 - 6 Years


Work closely with business stakeholders to gather, document, and translate business requirements into analytical and reporting solutions.
Design meaningful business metrics, KPIs, and dashboards using Power BI Desktop & Service.
Write, validate, and optimize complex SQL queries on large, complex datasets to support reporting and analysis.
Perform data analysis, data validation, and reconciliation to ensure accuracy and consistency of reports.
Collaborate with BI Engineers and QA to ensure end-to-end data quality and business logic correctness.
Use DAX and Power Query to create efficient calculations, transformations, and data models.
Apply strong financial and analytical acumen to derive insights and support data-driven decision making.
Present insights and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
Manage multiple priorities and deliver high-quality analytics solutions under tight timelines.

title: Messaging Abuse Analyst
description:
Minimum qualifications:


Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
5 years of experience in data analysis, including identifying trends, generating summary statistics, and drawing insights from quantitative and qualitative data.
5 years of experience managing projects and defining project scope, goals, and deliverables.


Preferred qualifications:


8 years of experience working on signal development, data analysis, cyber security or anti-abuse.
Experience programming in one or more languages (e.g., Python, Golang).
Experience working with complex engineering systems and processes.
Experience with fraud/abuse investigations, fraud risk management, security and threat analysis in the context of internet, telephone, or communication-related products.
Knowledge of SMS/MMS/RCS or SIM/phone number fraud and abuse.
Excellent communication and presentation skills to deliver findings to cross-functional partners, and the ability to influence cross-functionally at various levels.


About The Job

Trust & Safety team members are tasked with identifying and taking on the biggest problems that challenge the safety and integrity of our products. They use technical know-how, excellent problem-solving skills, user insights, and proactive communication to protect users and our partners from abuse across Google products like Search, Maps, Gmail, and Google Ads. On this team, you're a big-picture thinker and strategic team-player with a passion for doing what’s right. You work globally and cross-functionally with Google engineers and product managers to identify and fight abuse and fraud cases at Google speed - with urgency. And you take pride in knowing that every day you are working hard to promote trust in Google and ensuring the highest levels of user safety.

The Trust and Safety (T&S) team has the critical responsibility of protecting Google's users by ensuring online safety by fighting fraud and abuse across Google products.

The Messaging Spam and Abuse team works on preventing abuse within the messaging ecosystem. We partner with product teams to identify potential abuse vectors ahead of new launches and establish, evaluate and maintain abuse protections.

On this team, you're a big-picture thinker and strategic team-player with a passion for doing what's right. You understand the user's point of view and are passionate about using your technical, analytical, and strategic acumen to protect our users. You work globally and cross-functionally with Google Engineers and Product Managers to navigate challenging online safety situations and handle abuse and fraud at Google scale.

At Google we work hard to earn our users’ trust every day. Trust & Safety is Google’s team of abuse fighting and user trust experts working daily to make the internet a safer place. We partner with teams across Google to deliver bold solutions in abuse areas such as malware, spam and account hijacking. A team of Analysts, Policy Specialists, Engineers, and Program Managers, we work to reduce risk and fight abuse across all of Google’s products, protecting our users, advertisers, and publishers across the globe in over 40 languages.

Responsibilities


Analyze emerging trends, conduct complex data analyses and identify new signals to develop solutions for scaled enforcement. Develop a deep understanding of abuse in messaging, current cross-product workflows and available intelligence.
Translate abuse protection requirements into data modeling initiatives and build prototypes.
Collaborate with Engineering, Product Managers, Program Manager groups to develop requirements documents based on robust data analysis and granular product understanding.
Perform active threat monitoring, identify gaps in abuse detection and constantly update abuse rules based on evolving patterns. Create real-time awareness of threats and educate clients to reduce the problem upstream.
Lead projects to prevent Google's infrastructure from being abused to harm users or commit financial fraud resulting in losses to users and/or Google. Collaborate with the carrier ecosystem to block bad actors (e.g., corrective/preemptive measures, fraud investigations).



Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

criteria.Industries: Information Services and Technology, Information and Internet

title: Data Analyst
description:
Some Careers Shine Brighter Than Others.

The Financial Crime (FC) Data Platforms team’s role is to manage data products, processes and applications on the Compliance/FC Data Lakes and Cloud Environments and define the strategy for their future evolution. This encompasses the end-to-end design, modelling and delivery of enhanced datasets to optimise the performance of our crime detection models and yield the greatest possible insight for all users, including FC Analyst, Investigator, Data Scientist and MI communities, many of whom we collaborate with closely. The team is also responsible for regulating the data environment, including platform architecture, management and configuration, security and data quality.

We are currently seeking an experienced professional to join our team in the role of Manager - Data Analyst

In This Role, You Will


Uses a range of data tools (including SQL and python on Hadoop and GCP environments) to perform analysis/analytics tasks on a broad range of dataset to yield insight which informs design of business and technical processes and data assets.
Demonstrates traceability of functional and non-functional requirements and solution design. Create analysis of data-driven product functionality.
Provides insight to how a Data Analyst should learn and progress throughout the organization. Drives adoption of the practice across the Data Analyst community.
Manages and evaluates the change impact assessments of proposed requirements. Understands and challenges the implications of change such as dependencies, feasibility, scope, outputs, and process.
Manages and provides domain expertise to support design development activities, e.g. reviewing technical documentation and working with data and technical specialists from stakeholder teams to design their capabilities (including models and business processes)
Manages and helps prepare for Design Authorities and other forums and works with the development team to ensure challenges raised are addressed.


To Be Successful You Will


Broad understanding of portfolio of design projects. Broad understanding of technical tools may be required dependent on the scope of the Agile Team.
Provides extended expertise in process and is considered an authority on data and how to use it to further the Value Stream business objectives.
Broad understanding of risk exposure to the bank and helping senior colleagues manage it. Assures delivery through the entire life cycle of the project of user requirements through to live.
Drives measurable continuous improvement into all delivery environments across all disciplines.
Ensuring team spirit: strong communication skills to collaborate with various stakeholders.


You’ll achieve more at HSBC

hsbc.com/careers

HSBC is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and, opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. We encourage applications from all suitably qualified persons irrespective of, but not limited to, their gender or genetic information, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, social status, medical care leave requirements, political affiliation, people with disabilities, color, national origin, veteran status, etc., We consider all applications based on merit and suitability to the role.”

Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.


Issued By HSBC Electronic Data Processing (India) Private LTD***

title: Data Analyst
description:
About the Role:




As a Data Analyst at PINscale, you will play a key role in transforming complex datasets into

actionable insights, enabling business teams to make data-driven decisions. You will work closely with

business and engineering teams to clean, transform, and analyze data, build reports and dashboards,

and deliver actionable insights.




Roles and Responsibilities:




● Design, build, and maintain dashboards and reports in line with business requirements.

● Validate datasets for accuracy, consistency, and completeness through systematic data quality

checks.

● Gather and understand analytics requirements and translate business questions into structured

data queries and reports.

● Ensure timely, accurate, and high-quality data deliveries.

● Detect, debug, and extract data records for root cause analysis and corrective resolution.

● Organize and structure data to create models that simplify analysis and visualization.

● Monitor metrics for production workloads, and optimize them for performance & cost.

● Handle confidential data responsibly and adhere to data governance standards.

● Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements, deliver data solutions, and

update datasets as needed when changes occur.

● Learn and adapt quickly to emerging analytics tools and techniques.

● Be ready to assist with additional tasks or projects based on team requirements.




Skills Required:




● Advanced expertise in SQL (BigQuery) and analytical querying.

● Hands-on experience with Looker Studio or equivalent BI tools.

● Strong Google Sheets skills for quick, ad-hoc analyses.

● Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail.

● Strong communication skills and proven ability to work with stakeholders.




Salary: 4.5 - 6 Lpa




Work Week: 6-day work week

title: Business Analyst II
description:
Summary:

The Employee Success Specialist is a member of the Employee Success Shared Services team and has an exciting opportunity with the ES Data Operations and Integrations Team in Hyderabad.

Responsibilities:
Process Mass Loads in Workday (EIB) for various transactions including One Time Payments, Job Changes, Org Changes, Personal Info changes, Stocks, Commission, Bonus, and Combination data loads.
Manage programs for all ES-related projects, actively collaborating with global partners.
Handle data management for all forms of employee data.
Conduct HR data audits in Workday and process corrections as required.
Troubleshoot issues, perform root cause analysis, and resolve issues.
Ensure the accuracy of internal process documentation, including updating existing documentation based on enhancements.
Identify and close knowledge gaps by creating, updating, and improving knowledge articles to keep information relevant for employees.
Proactively identify process improvements and redundancies, collaborating towards a more productive process that enhances the employee experience.
Assist in testing configuration, and implementation of new projects, enhancements, and interfaces.
Ensure compliance with audit requirements by completing work correctly and timely.
Collaborate effectively with stakeholders and other support teams to resolve issues, ensuring consistency across applicable processes and implementing changes where needed.
Maintain an appropriate level of process, program, and policy knowledge to assist Employees and Managers.
Provide superior customer service to employees using our customer service portal.
Own data integrity of all employee change transactions by following the outlined peer review/audit process.
Requirements:
4 years of experience in HR shared services organization for an established company.
Experience in Workday HCM, EIB loads, and Workday reporting - Basic.
Experience working across multiple disciplines and geographies in HR.
Experience utilizing a case management tool.

title: Program/Project Management Analyst
description:
Overview

The transitions specialist works with the transitions manager to plan and execute one or more of the migration projects.


This position will be responsible for successful migration of specified roles into GCC
They will work across the team to ensure knowledge sharing and enabling the delivery team to be well prepared for the go live


Responsibilities

Doing the following for their specific projects, under supervision of Transitions Manager


Plan transitions in detail, including identification and scheduling project deliverables, milestones, required tasks & scope of processes to be transitioned
Provide feedback to TM/s on service design & solution documentation
Coordinate and successfully project manage the transition of processes in scope from the local site/s into the BSC (Manage the transition on site)
Collaborate with TM/s and local site management
Monitoring and reporting on transition progress
Resolving transitions issues, document risks and create mitigation plans
Providing a link during transition between the BSC Knowledge Capture Team, senior level management, TM, other stakeholders
Ensure the appropriate documentation of the local processes, including providing a quality review of documentation (Process Maps and Desktop Procedures)
Ensure correct application of transition methodology to each transition being managed by the TC
Ensure successful delivery of transition outputs, including Decision Gates, Ramp Up & Go Lives, and the overall transition completion


Qualifications


Proven ability to work with different stakeholders, excellent stakeholder management and client handling (domestic & international) skills
Excellent communication (written and oral) and interpersonal skills
Proven ability to manage change in a fluid, dynamic and evolving environment
Track record of excellent project execution / delivery preferred
Understanding of metrics, process improvements, lean and six sigma would be helpful
Proficient with MS Office – MS Excel and MS Power point in particular

criteria.Industries: Manufacturing and Food and Beverage Services

title: Financial Analyst I
description:
Description

GAR (Global Accts Rec) is looking for a proactive, customer and people centric Finance Team Leader to support the Collections process. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the collection efforts, ensuring that accounts are handled appropriately and communicate with clients as required to increase the percentage of on-time payments. This person is result-oriented, multitasker with strong communication skills. Foster team unity as you build relationships while working closely with your team and fellow managers to continually reach department goals

Key job responsibilities


Be an expert in the collection processes.
Support creation and implementation of strategies to increase the number of successful collections on past due invoices and increase the penetration of accounts
Handle communication with clients on complex scenarios to ensure good customer experience
Collect, track and present metrics, and drive process improvements
Troubleshoot and triage any technical issues during collections and report as needed for long term sustainability of the process
Contribute to improvements in collection projects by identifying any issues, proposing enhancements in tools and working on continuous improvement of collection protocol and process.
Communicate internally or externally to identify issues and propose solutions for long term sustainability of processes
Willing to create and implement standard operating procedures, quality guidelines and process workflows
Leading and developing a team of collection analysts, including hiring, training, and employee development
Managing group workload , establishing priorities and performing regular audits to ensure existing policies and procedures are followed
Managing annual performance targets, creating and monitoring appropriate performance metrics
Act as an escalation point in resolving complex outstanding issues with internal and external stakeholders


Basic Qualifications


Bachelor's degree or above in finance, accounting or related field
In depth knowledge of Order to Cash Process
6+ years of experience in Accounts Receivables with at least 1 year of people management and collections experience
Demonstrate ability to lead diverse talent within a team, work cross-functionally, and build consensus on difficult issues
Excellent negotiation, interpersonal, verbal and written communication skills
Ability to work under pressure and with strict deadlines
Proficient in Microsoft Excel and Word
Experience in driving process improvements and operational efficiency projects


Preferred Qualifications


Post-graduation or a Master’s Degree Accounting/Finance or a related field

title: Analyst - Institutional Client reporting
description:
At Franklin Templeton, we’re driving our industry forward by developing new and innovative ways to help our clients achieve their investment goals. Our dynamic and diversified firm spans asset management, wealth management, and fintech, offering many ways to help investors make progress toward their goals. Our talented teams working around the globe bring expertise that’s both broad and unique. From our welcoming, inclusive, and flexible culture to our global and diverse business, we offer opportunities not only to help you reach your potential but also to contribute to our clients’ achievements.

Come join us in delivering better outcomes for our clients around the world!

About The Department


The Institutional Client Reporting (ICR) team within Marketing Operations delivers high‑quality reporting for institutional clients across separate accounts and funds. The team partners closely with Performance & Attribution, Portfolio Accounting, Investment teams, Sales, and other groups to ensure accurate, timely client reporting. Team members work collaboratively, apply strong analytical skills, and gain exposure to multiple investment functions while contributing directly to client service excellence.


How will you add value?

Core Responsibilities


You will deliver scheduled client reports on time and with accuracy.
You will use reporting platforms to produce automated client reports.
You will prepare manual reports using PowerPoint and Excel.
You will follow procedures and escalate issues when required.
You will maintain strong communication with business partners.
You will respond promptly to internal queries.
You will support regulatory reporting requirements.
You will prepare client meeting materials.
You will review and validate data to resolve discrepancies.


Strategic Responsibilities


You will maintain knowledge of client needs and reporting systems.
You will support process‑improvement initiatives.
You will assist in testing new tools and recommending enhancements.
You will update policies and procedures.
You will maintain logs and reporting metrics.
You will align SharePoint tasks with reporting workflows.
You will participate in cross‑training to support continuity.


What will help you be successful in this role?

Experience, Education & Certifications


Bachelor’s degree required; Master’s preferred.
0–2 years in financial services.
Strong English communication skills.
Ability to manage tight deadlines with accuracy.
Understanding of data confidentiality.
Strong analytical and problem‑solving ability.
Ability to collaborate with multiple stakeholders.


Technical Skills


Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.
Advanced Excel and PowerPoint skills preferred.
Knowledge of SharePoint development is a plus.
Familiarity with tools such as Alteryx, Tableau, Xceptor, RPA, or Power BI is an advantage.


Soft Skills


Attention to detail.
Results‑focused mindset.
Clear and proactive communication.
Ability to manage multiple tasks.


Work Shift Timings - 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM IST

Experience our welcoming culture and reach your professional and personal potential!

Our culture is shaped by our diverse global workforce and strongly held core values. Regardless of your interests, lifestyle, or background, there’s a place for you at Franklin Templeton. We provide employees with the tools, resources, and learning opportunities to help them excel in their career and personal life.

Hear more from our employees

By joining us, you will become part of a culture that focuses on employee well-being and provides multidimensional support for a positive and healthy lifestyle. We understand that benefits are at the core of employee well-being and may vary depending on individual needs. Whether you need support for maintaining your physical and mental health, saving for life’s adventures, taking care of your family members, or making a positive impact in your community, we aim to have them covered.

Highlights Of Our Benefits Include


Professional development growth opportunities through in-house classes and over 150 Web-based training courses
An educational assistance program to financially help employees seeking continuing education
Medical, Life and Personal Accident Insurance benefit for employees. Medical insurance also cover employee’s dependents (spouses, children and dependent parents)
Life insurance for protection of employees’ families
Personal accident insurance for protection of employees and their families
Personal loan assistance
Employee Stock Investment Plan (ESIP)
12 weeks Paternity leave
Onsite fitness center, recreation center, and cafeteria
Transport facility
Child day care facility for women employees
Cricket grounds and gymnasium
Library
Health Center with doctor availability
HDFC ATM on the campus


Learn more about the wide range of benefits we offer at Franklin Templeton

Franklin Templeton is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants and existing employees, and we evaluate qualified applicants without regard to ancestry, age, color, disability, genetic information, gender, gender identity, or gender expression, marital status, medical condition, military or veteran status, national origin, race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, and any other basis protected by federal, state, or local law, ordinance, or regulation.

Franklin Templeton is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive environment. If you believe that you need an accommodation or adjustment to search for or apply for one of our positions, please send an email to accommodations@franklintempleton.com. In your email, please include the accommodation or adjustment you are requesting, the job title, and the job number you are applying for. It may take up to three business days to receive a response to your request. Please note that only accommodation requests will receive a response.

title: Associate - Operations
description:
Company Description

WNS (Holdings) Limited (NYSE: WNS), is a leading Business Process Management (BPM) company. We combine our deep industry knowledge with technology and analytics expertise to co-create innovative, digital-led transformational solutions with clients across 10 industries. We enable businesses in Travel, Insurance, Banking and Financial Services, Manufacturing, Retail and Consumer Packaged Goods, Shipping and Logistics, Healthcare, and Utilities to re-imagine their digital future and transform their outcomes with operational excellence.

We deliver an entire spectrum of BPM services in finance and accounting, procurement, customer interaction services and human resources leveraging collaborative models that are tailored to address the unique business challenges of each client. We co-create and execute the future vision of 400+ clients with the help of our 44,000+ employees. Our global footprint spans 16 countries with 61 delivery centers worldwide including in China, Costa Rica, India, the Philippines, Poland, Romania, South Africa, Spain, Sri Lanka, Turkey, United Kingdom and the United States.

Job Description

Good Communication Skills (Written) Typing Speed of 25 WPM + 90% Accuracy. Should be able to work in Shifts. Should be ok to work from Office in HYD. No prior work experience required .Also, Preferably with experience in Shipping and Logistics / Back Office Understanding its nuances.

Qualifications

Graduate - any stream

Additional Information

Freshers can apply

title: Associate Manager
description:
Overview

Support core financial planning processes (Month-end closing, Forecast, AOP, etc.) through data collection, verification and processing, to ensure timely submission to GBS and Sector, looking for automation, digitalization and streamlining of current processes

Work closely with Finance and Non-Finance stakeholders (Sales Finance, Supply Chain Finance, FP&A, Control, etc.) supporting and ensuring a robust and working solution across PBNA

Work closely with the IT/consulting houses to test the system as it is being developed and drive enhancements

Escalate issues as they arise to the IT and Business design team - coordinate action plans in response to findings and ensure timely resolution

Ensure linkages between cubes exist (e.g. sales demand to COGS volume) master data connections are mapped.

Live market support:


Conduct thorough data validation to ensure data pipelines meet business requirements.
Gain knowledge on how data is being processed and transformed from different sources and prepared for the Mosaic product.

Bridge the gap and coordinate with tech and FPA teams to ensure the data quality


Support sustainable data solution:


Collaborate with business users, data engineers, product owners and BI developers to design and implement end-to-end data solutions.

criteria.Industries: Manufacturing and Food and Beverage Services

title: Business Analyst
description:
Payments Business Analyst - FX




Deloitte is actively hiring Business Analyst experienced in the Banking domain and Digital Transformation initiatives, specifically in Payments (Domestic / International Payment Schemes, end-to-end Payment’s lifecycle experience, corporate payments).




Location - PAN India

Hybrid Mode of working

Experience - 12-18Yrs (8+yrs as Relevant)




Domain Knowledge and Experience of being part of project with some or all of the mentioned functionalities:




FX Order Placement & Execution

Forward Contracts: Lock in an exchange rate for a future date, helping customers manage currency risk for upcoming transactions.
FX Limit Orders: Set target exchange rates; the app automatically executes the conversion when the market hits the specified rate.




FX Rate Alerts & Market Insights

Rate Notifications: Set up alerts for preferred exchange rates, so customers are notified when their target rate is reached.
Market News & Analysis: Access curated FX market insights, trends, and forecasts directly within the app.







Role Description:

Associate will be part of Digital Transformation projects with Global Banks supported by Deloitte
Should be able to exhibit digital transformation experience of delivering Banking products
Is expected to work with end client business stakeholders, transformation colleagues and technology teams while delivering requirements on the assigned programs
Should have excellent communication, articulation, and stakeholder management skills
Should be able to articulate change management experience
Should have experience and be comfortable working in Agile environment
Demonstrate experience in coordinating business stakeholders, development and testing teams during the development lifecycle
Ability to work in fast paced environment; possess excellent written & verbal communication skills.
Desirable to have experience with backlog management tools (e.g. Jira)
Desirable to have designing, developing, and maintaining complex applications using TDD and BDD practices
Spot FX Transactions: Instantly convert currencies at prevailing market rates. Customers can transfer funds between their own accounts in different currencies or make international payments.

title: Research Analyst
description:
Job Purpose

To recommend and advise investors for various investment ideas from medium to long term perspective by doing quantitative and qualitative analysis of listed companies. To contribute to the team activities in generating investment ideas, creating and maintaining large and complex databases, help in preparing various reports like strategy note, morning note, weekly market updates. These activities will help in driving sales and information dissemination to investors and sales force.

Job Context & Major Challenges

Aditya Birla Money Ltd. (ABML) is primarily a Broking Company, deals in Equity, Commodity & Currency. Workforce of ~800 spread across ~40 locations with customer base of in excess of 3 lacs. Commodity operations are managed through its 100% subsidiary Aditya Birla Commodities Broking limited. ABML is one of the leading securities trading companies in the country. ABML operates in a fragmented equity broking business and has a daily turnover of close to 3,000 Crores with a market share of 1%. ABM works in a highly regulated environment with a host of regulators like SEBI, RBI, AMFI, FMC, IRDA etc. regulating its day to day operations. In addition to the regulator ABML is also subject to close monitoring and inspection through various agencies like NSE / BSE / NCDX / MCX / NSDL / CDSL etc. ABML also operates in a highly competitive market mainly in fragmented industry with ABML competition from major National Broking houses like ICICI Securities, HDFC Securities, Angel Broking, MOFSL etc. and a range of local Broking outfits.

Majority of the broking houses have set up in-house research team that scans companies and stocks as well as analyse macro-economic scenario that impacts the stock market. The Research team at the Fundamental side values the securities based on the growth prospects and attractiveness of the underlying business. It involves analyzing the financials, competitive advantages of the business, quality of management and competitive environment it operates in among other factors. The theory of Research revolves around the fact that the market price of an asset may deviate from its fair value in short term due to extraneous factors such as market trends or investor sentiments, but will tend to move towards its intrinsic value over the long term.

The Key Responsibilities Of Sr. /Research Analyst Are


To build large databases by extracting and collating appropriate datasets from data vendors like Bloomberg, Reuters, Cline, etc.
To analyse large and complex databases of macro and micro information and create well-structured reports.
To disseminate research reports/output to investors/clients helping them take investment decisions.
To provide research support and inputs for consumption by the investment team in building portfolios and prepare reports/advisory for the clients.
To timely work on and generate investment ideas so as to capture maximum gains out of it.


The Primary Challenges Faced Are


To find investible ideas based on rigorous analysis of data/information sourced from quality database available in the market within a sector, given different risk return profiles and competitive advantages of various companies within a sector.
In a an environment, which is constantly moving and changing, the key challenge is to stay abreast with latest updates in a sector and the companies within it, so as to take nimble investment decisions.
The challenge is to clearly communicate the investment thesis for a company/sector in a manner which clearly highlights the investment case and arguments so that the investment team/investors can take an informed investment decision.
Another key challenge of the role is to take relative investment calls when absolute opportunities are more than what can be accommodated in the portfolio


Critical Skillsets are the individual must have a strong knack for financial analysis and equity research. The role involves minor level of client interaction and hence good interpersonal skills are desirable.

Key Result Areas

KRA (Accountabilities) (Max 1325 Characters)Supporting Actions (Max 1325 Characters)

KRA1 To be able to build, maintain and analyze large and complex databases of macro and micro information


To build large databases by extracting/collating appropriate datasets from data vendors like Bloomberg, Reuters, Cline, etc. and organize the data into sub-heads (viz. macros / micros / sectoral / valuations).
To understand the growth trends of the industry by analysing parameters affecting the dynamics of the industry.
To analyze data using top-down approach (international asset class level, country level and sector level) and also on a bottom up basis on assigned sectors to come up with investment ideas for the investment team and clients.


KRA2 To be able to conduct quantitative and qualitative analysis of the companies of specific sectors and participate in team research activities


To analyze companies/sectors using tools like ratio analysis, time series and cross sectional analysis, so as to make a judgment regarding investment potential of the various sectors and the companies within various sectors.
To read relevant materials from the industry body and participate in industry conferences to maintain the sharpness in investment analysis.
To meet the managements of a company and understand the key trends in the sector, the company and its future plan.
To project the earnings of the company in medium and long term.


KRA3 To be able to disseminate research based output to investors/clients helping them take investment decisions


To prepare an investment argument based on the findings of the analysis and help the investment team build a portfolio as per the risk/return framework of the investor.
To contribute to various products which require team efforts like strategic investment report, morning report, morning sales note, concalls, weekly report.
To increase the visibility of the research team by contributing articles to various media reports.

title: Business Analyst
description:
We're looking for a Business Analytics who can be the analytical brain behind Chalo Premium Buses. You'll convert data from routes, users, and revenue into decisions that move the business forward.This isn't just number-crunching, you'll bridge business stakeholders and our tech/data science teams, deliver performance visibility, proactive insights, and build automation-first reporting systems.




Location: Navi Mumbai

Experience: 3-6 years




What You'll Do




Revenue & Forecasting




Own end-to-end revenue analysis, demand forecasting models, and unit economics tracking
Support data-driven pricing decisions with cost vs. budget analysis




Business Insights & Root Cause Analysis




Lead structured RCAs for revenue, bookings, and user behavior deviations
Proactively surface trends and deliver prioritized action recommendations




Analytics & Reporting




Analyze route-level profitability, load factors, and user cohorts (acquisition, retention, churn)
Build and automate daily/weekly/monthly dashboards across SQL, event tracking, and ops systems
Conduct funnel analysis and recommend product interventions




AI & Automation




Use LLM tools to accelerate insights and reporting
Collaborate with data scientists on demand and churn models
Champion data-driven culture and automation-first workflows




What We're Looking For




3-6 years of experience in business analytics, data analytics, or similar roles
Advanced SQL - you should be comfortable with large-scale cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, etc.)
BI Tools - Experience with Metabase, Tableau, Power BI, or similar (mandatory)
Event Analytics - Proficiency with event tracking platforms (Amplitude, Mixpanel, etc.)
Excel/Google Sheets - Advanced level (mandatory)
Strong understanding of P&L, unit economics, and transport KPIs
Hypothesis-first, structured problem-solving approach
Ability to convert analysis into clear, concise business narratives
Confident presenter to senior leadership
Travel-tech, mobility, or transport experience preferred

criteria.Industries: Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage, Software Development, and IT Services and IT Consulting

title: Data Analyst [T500-20905]
description:
About Delta Tech Hub:

Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) is the U.S. global airline leader in safety, innovation, reliability and customer experience. Powered by our employees around the world, Delta has for a decade led the airline industry in operational excellence while maintaining our reputation for award-winning customer service. With our mission of connecting the people and cultures of the globe, Delta strives to foster understanding across a diverse world and serve as a force for social good. Delta has fast emerged as a customer-oriented, innovation-led, technology-driven business. The Delta Technology Hub will contribute directly to these objectives. It will sustain our long-term aspirations of delivering niche, IP-intensive, high-value, and innovative solutions. It supports various teams and functions across Delta and is an integral part of our transformation agenda, working seamlessly with a global team to create memorable experiences for customers.




Responsibilities:

Data Integration and Harmonization:

Aggregate and normalize HR data from multiple platforms
Implement data transformation and enrichment processes to support analytics and reporting needs.




Data Quality and Monitoring:

Develop and implement data validation and monitoring frameworks to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to data quality, latency, or performance.




Collaboration with Stakeholders:

Partner with teams, analysts, and data scientists to understand data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
Provide technical support and guidance on data-related issues or projects.




Tooling and Automation:

Leverage cloud-based solutions and frameworks (e.g., AWS) to streamline processes and enhance automation.
Maintain and optimize existing workflows while continuously identifying opportunities for improvement.




Continuous Learning and Innovation:

Stay current with industry trends, tools, and technologies in data engineering and marketing analytics.
Recommend and implement innovative solutions to improve the scalability and efficiency of data systems.




What you need to succeed (minimum qualifications):

Bachelor’s or master’s in data science, Business Analytics, Information Science, Computer Science, Statistics, or a related field.
2+ yrs of Experience as Data Analyst with experience in Python (NumPy & Pandas) including (Matplotlib / Seaborn) & EDA & SQL & Scikit learn library.
Experience with AWS DB - (S3 Bucket or Redshift) is required.
Basic understanding of ETL / Glue data pipelines.




Behavioral Competencies:

Ability to work in collaborative environments and embrace diverse perspectives.
Communicate clearly and concisely, express thoughts and ideas effectively, and embrace cultural differences with respect when engaging with others.
Ability to engage effectively with peers and stakeholders to build strong partnerships.
Prioritize, maintain focus, and consistently deliver commitment.
Proactively understand customer expectations and willingness to create customer-based solutions.




What will give you a competitive edge (preferred qualifications):

Hands on Experience with Dashboarding e.g, Quick sight.
Desired experience working with HR Data.
Experience working with Glue/Lambda to develop data pipelines.
Experience working with DBT.

title: Associate
description:
Line of Service
Advisory



Industry/Sector
Not Applicable



Specialism
Managed Services



Management Level
Associate



Job Description & Summary
A career within General Consulting services, will provide you with the opportunity to help clients seize essential advantages by working alongside business leaders to solve their toughest problems and capture their greatest opportunities. We work with some of the world’s largest and most complex companies to understand their unique business issues and opportunities in an ever changing environment. We help create sustainable change by stimulating innovation, unlocking data possibilities, navigating risk and regulatory complexity, optimising deals, and aligning costs with business strategy to create a competitive advantage.


To really stand out and make us fit for the future in a constantly changing world, each and every one of us at PwC needs to be a purpose-led and values-driven leader at every level. To help us achieve this we have the PwC Professional; our global leadership development framework. It gives us a single set of expectations across our lines, geographies and career paths, and provides transparency on the skills we need as individuals to be successful and progress in our careers, now and in the future.

As an Associate, you'll work as part of a team of problem solvers, helping to solve complex business issues from strategy to execution. PwC Professional skills and responsibilities for this management level include but are not limited to:



Invite and give in the moment feedback in a constructive manner.
Share and collaborate effectively with others.
Identify and make suggestions for improvements when problems and/or opportunities arise.
Handle, manipulate and analyse data and information responsibly.
Follow risk management and compliance procedures.
Keep up-to-date with developments in area of specialism.
Communicate confidently in a clear, concise and articulate manner - verbally and in the materials I produce.
Build and maintain an internal and external network.
Seek opportunities to learn about how PwC works as a global network of firms.
Uphold the firm's code of ethics and business conduct.


Mandatory skill sets- Planning, creating, Research    
Year of experience required- 2-5    
Qualifications- PG

Required Skills

title: Credit Analyst – Fixed Income
description:
Job Purpose

The Credit Analyst supports the Fixed Income investment team by conducting rigorous credit research on issuers across corporate bonds, money?market instruments, securitized products, and financial institutions. The role enhances portfolio quality by identifying attractive opportunities, monitoring credit risks, and providing actionable recommendations aligned with the fund’s risk appetite and regulatory guidelines.

Job Context & Major Challenges

Job Context/Job Challenges

ABSLAMC offers investors a range of comprehensive investment options, which includes diversified and sector specific equity schemes, hybrid funds and a wide range of debt and treasury products. Its offerings also include Portfolio advisory services for High Net worth individuals as well as offshore funds for Non Resident Indians. There are approx. 119 schemes managed by the organisation as on Nov 2017. The Company follows a long-term, fundamental research based approach to investment and thrives to provide a transparent and ethical services to its investors.

One Of The Key Challenges For ABSLAMC Has Been To Maintain a Balance Between Moving With Dynamic And Constantly Changing Regulatory Norms Of The Country And Maintaining Growth And Profitability In The Extremely Competitive Market. And Some Of Key Strengths Of The Organization That Have Helped It To Sustain And Grow Are

Focus on Technology-The organization has been in the forefront in implementing technological innovation to foster innovation and also to improve efficiency for its stakeholders, whether it is employees, clients or distributors

Product Innovation-ABSLAMC has been known to be a pioneer in terms of products and has a history of launching innovative, category defining products like Birla Cash plus, etc.

Research based approach-ABSLAMC has one of the largest team of research analyst dedicated to tracking down the best companies to invest in

Strong Distributor Delivery Mechanism-The Company has developed a 4 -pronged sales/delivery mechanism to ensure maximum reach and penetration to the end customers. This mechanism includes Company’s direct Channels (branches/online), Independent Financial Advisors (IFAs), National Distributors (ND) and Banks.

Regulator Interface-ABSLAMC plays a key role in the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI) with quite a few members of the top management being a part of the AMFI Board. It has hence ensured that it can discuss any new Industry development from a regulatory perspective at the initial stages with the Regulator as well as the Industry Association

People Management-ABSLAMC believes in continuously measuring the perception of its people using a 4-S approach, namely Satisfaction, Say, Stay and Strive, which has enabled it to garner a workforce committed and aligned to the overall business success.

Key Challenges For The Role Are As Follows

To predict performance trends of various companies and sectors and recommend investments in credit worthy companies within the sectors.

Ensuring zero NPAs by thorough due diligence and continuous tracking of the companys performance.

Continuously scouting for new investment avenues which could offer a higher yield but still would protect the investors’ interests.

Understanding industry dynamics, various business models and global and domestic factors that can impact the companys operating cash flows and consequently the ability to repay its obligations

Aligning views to fast changing economic environment and volatile markets

Key Result Areas

KRA (Accountabilities) (Max 1325 Characters)Supporting Actions (Max 1325 Characters)

KRA1 Fundamental Credit Research


Analyse issuers primarily BFSI using detailed study of financial statements, capital structure, liquidity, business models, and industry dynamics.
Evaluate key credit metrics: leverage, coverage ratios, working capital trends, cash?flow durability, refinancing risk, and promoter/ownership strength.
Assess ESG and governance factors that materially influence creditworthiness.


KRA2 Monitoring & Surveillance of Portfolio Exposures


Track all invested names for rating actions, covenant breaches, sector developments, regulatory changes, and adverse news.
Maintain internal credit ratings and outlooks, updating them based on earnings releases, management interactions, and market indicators (spreads, CDS, curve movements).
Generate early?warning signals for potential deterioration in issuer quality.


KRA3 Market & Sector Analysis


Analyse sectoral credit trends, cyclical vs structural risks, competitive position, and regulatory frameworks.
Contribute to top?down sectoral exposure strategy and recommendations.


KRA4 Investment Recommendations


Prepare concise and actionable credit notes for Investment Committee discussion:
Strengths & weaknesses
Key risks & mitigants
Valuation attractiveness (spreads vs peers, curve positioning, liquidity)
Highlight suitability of issuers/securities for different fund mandates (liquid, ultra?short, short?term, corporate bond, dynamic bond, credit risk, etc.).

KRA5 Engagement


Conduct periodic calls/meetings with company management, rating agencies, bankers, auditors, and sector experts.
Perform channel checks—vendors, customers, competitors—where relevant.


KRA 6 Regulatory & Policy Compliance


Ensure investments align with SEBI regulations, internal credit policy, exposure norms, issuer caps, and rating thresholds.
Maintain full documentation of credit notes, approvals, internal limits, and ongoing surveillance.


KRA7

Collaboration


Work closely with the team to support portfolio construction and trade decisions.


Collaborate with risk, compliance, and operations for approvals, risk sign?offs, and policy adherence

title: Associate
description:
Line of Service
Advisory



Industry/Sector
Not Applicable



Specialism
Data, Analytics & AI



Management Level
Associate



Job Description & Summary
A career within Data and Analytics services will provide you with the opportunity to help organisations uncover enterprise insights and drive business results using smarter data analytics. We focus on a collection of organisational technology capabilities, including business intelligence, data management, and data assurance that help our clients drive innovation, growth, and change within their organisations in order to keep up with the changing nature of customers and technology. We make impactful decisions by mixing mind and machine to leverage data, understand and navigate risk, and help our clients gain a competitive edge.

Creating business intelligence from data requires an understanding of the business, the data, and the technology used to store and analyse that data. Using our Rapid Business Intelligence Solutions, data visualisation and integrated reporting dashboards, we can deliver agile, highly interactive reporting and analytics that help our clients to more effectively run their business and understand what business questions can be answered and how to unlock the answers.


Hiring Chartered Accountants
Faster, better, and stronger finance functions significantly contribute to organization-
wide agility, results and effectiveness. Finance has been in the midst of a digital
revolution coupled with new-age operating models and capabilities. These value levers
have increasingly led to bigger and more sustained outcomes from Finance
Transformation. We believe these are irreversible trends in the medium term and
finance teams must take advantage of this opportune time to transform. We work
closely with finance leaders and draw on industry trends, insights, accelerators, and our
body of work to reimagine their people, processes and technology with a clear roadmap
of how value can be realised. We look well beyond the obvious and partner with clients
to frame the potential value, levers and then help implement the roadmap in a credible
way that builds confidence and buy-in from all stakeholders. We work in small cross-
functional and efficient teams and run iterative sprints to enable incremental and rapid
change delivering fast results.
Managing business performance in today’s complex and rapidly changing business
environment is crucial for any organization’s short-term and long-term success. But
ensuring compliance with the continual changes to regulatory requirements, and the
ability to plan and monitor performance against plans and budgets, is quite challenging.
As part of the Technology Consulting –Data & Analytics Practice, we leverage
opportunities around digital disruption to deliver technology enabled transformation to
our clients .
Within the Technology Consulting practice, our FS D&A competency - Risk, Reg &
Finance Data team works on transformational engagements from strategy through
execution, helping our clients solve business problems using Data & Analytics
technology as an enabler. Some of our key focus areas include:

 Ind AS 109 / IFRS9 implementation covering ECL, EIR
 Profitability analysis and Cost Management covering areas such as Activity
based Costing, Segmental reporting, Dupont analysis, CFO digital playbook
 ALM & FTP engine
 Regulatory and Risk Reporting Implementation & Risk analytics
 Regulatory & Risk Change Management (IRAC, BCBS, Exposure, NSFR, LCR,
RWA, Risk based supervision)
 Global Markets Change Management
 Reconciliation Management & Automation
 Pricing Analytics
Roles and responsibilities
The Consultant will be working for the Technology Consulting - FS D&A competency
- Risk, Reg & Finance Data team of PwC India in a Business Analyst (BA) role. As a
BA with PwC India, you will play a key client-facing role in the engagement execution by

working closely with client teams for defining business requirements, understanding
regulatory & financial needs & helping the technology teams during solution
implementation. You will be provided with varied responsibilities including client
acquisition support, assisting in solution design, contributing to engagement execution
as a team member and on-ground client management. We also provide our BAs with
opportunities to contribute to various thought leadership initiatives. Our BAs are
excellent generalists and have a strong ability to work with managers with diverse
backgrounds.

Essential Skills:
 Understands Finance processes. Knowledge of other business functions will be
an added advantage
 Basic problem solving skills with an ability to use data to draw business insights
 Excellent communication skills including proficiency in English language
 Proficiency in excel and power point
 Self-disciplined and self -motivated
 Strong team building, partnership and collaboration skills
 Ability to innovate, create lasting relationships and work independently with little
supervision
The role can be based out of any location where PwC India has its offices with preferred
location being Mumbai but will demand traveling to other client locations as well.

·
·
The role can be based out of any location where PwC India has its offices but will
demand traveling to other client locations as well as this is a client facing role.

title: Commercial Junior Business Analyst
description:
We are Inizio Ignite, the global advisory partner for health and life sciences encompassing connected expertise across Research Partnership, Putnam, STEM, and Vynamic. Guided by purpose, passion, and precision, we collaborate with clients to ignite impact, accelerate performance, and deliver lasting change for patients. By uniting strategy, insights, and innovation with a unique depth and breadth of expertise, we drive transformation and shape the future of health. Proudly part of Inizio – the market-leading commercialization partner for health and life sciences. From early-stage development to loss of exclusivity, we simplify complexity, unlock value, and make collaboration seamless at every pivotal moment – helping healthcare leaders shape strategy and drive meaningful change. 

The role

We are seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Junior Business Analyst to join Inizio’s Commercial Finance team. Reporting directly to the Senior Business Analyst, you will play a key role in supporting commercial and strategic initiatives across the Group, with a particular focus on delivering high-quality, data-driven insights.

This role is ideally suited to someone who enjoys working hands-on with data, is comfortable spending significant time in Excel and Power BI, and takes pride in producing accurate, reliable outputs that senior stakeholders can depend on.

This is an exciting time to join Inizio as we continue to enhance our enterprise reporting capabilities. You will play a meaningful role in building a scalable, insight-led reporting environment that supports strategic decision-making across the organisation.

Key Responsibilities


Contribute to the implementation of a new enterprise reporting infrastructure by validating outputs, reconciling data discrepancies, and ensuring end-to-end data integrity.
Support the development of robust performance metrics.
Work with third-party data providers to support the integration of external market data into internal reporting structures.
Assist in the development, harmonisation, and maintenance of Power BI dashboards.
Support internal engagement and adoption of analytical tools across the Group.
Collaborate cross-functionally to align with business priorities.
Provide project and coordination support.


Essential

Skills and experience


Degree in a numerically focused discipline (e.g., Mathematics, Economics, Finance, Engineering, Data Science or similar)
Advanced Excel skills
Strong ability to manipulate, reconcile, and validate large, complex datasets.
Highly methodical and detail-oriented with exceptional numerical accuracy.
Comfortable spending significant time working independently with data.


Desirable


Some knowledge of PowerBI, including report building and dashboards.
Comfortable working with data and systems in a finance or commercial environment.
Commercially aware, with an interest in understanding business performance drivers.
Adaptable and comfortable working in an evolving systems and analytics landscape.


Don't meet every job requirement? That's okay! Our company is dedicated to building an inclusive and authentic workplace. If you're excited about this role, but your experience doesn't perfectly fit every qualification, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right person for this role or others.
Show more

title: Pricing Analyst
description:
Role - Senior Analyst – Pricing

Location -Bangalore

11:30 AM – 8:00 PM




We’re seeking a Senior Analyst – Pricing to support global pursuits and commercial decision‑making in a fast‑paced professional services environment. You’ll play a key role in shaping competitive pricing strategies through analytics, benchmarking, and strong stakeholder collaboration.




What You’ll Do

Support end‑to‑end pricing for global pursuits, RFPs, and fee proposals
Build and analyze pricing models using rate cards, fees, and assumptions across geographies
Apply inflation adjustments and develop indicative and scenario‑based pricing
Review and challenge member‑firm quotes to drive optimal commercial outcomes
Conduct benchmarking and trend analysis using historical and market data
Partner with engagement teams and global stakeholders to resolve pricing queries
Maintain pricing databases and support automation and pricing tool enhancements

What You Bring

Bachelor’s degree (MBA preferred)
3–4 years’ experience in pricing, ideally within IT or professional services
Strong analytical mindset with advanced Excel skills
Experience with competitive tenders and pricing databases
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a global environment

Nice to Have

Exposure to Power BI, SQL, or data visualization tools
Knowledge of financial statements, tax concepts, or pricing automation
Project Management or Lean Six Sigma certification




Why Join?

Work on high‑visibility global pursuits, collaborate with international teams, and grow your career at the intersection of analytics and commercial strategy.

criteria.Industries: Technology, Information and Media, Business Consulting and Services, and IT Services and IT Consulting

title: Senior Product Analyst
description:
About Licious

We are Licious and we are a Bengaluru-based meat and seafood company founded in 2015 by Abhay Hanjura and Vivek Gupta, our founders, foodies, and friends. We pride ourselves on being India’s most successful D2C food-tech brand operating in 20 cities across the country, delighting over 32 lac customers with our de-licious fresh meat and seafood!







What You’ll Do

Drive Strategic Impact: Collaborate on high-priority product and business initiatives by providing actionable insights through data analysis and experimentation.
Performance Tracking: Build and maintain dashboards to track business performance, product instrumentation, and key metrics.
Deliver Insights: Use statistical tools, data visualization, and business use cases to deliver meaningful insights to Product and Business teams.
Collaborate with Cross-functional Teams: Partner closely with Product and Growth teams to support decision-making and product strategies.
Experimentation and Product Delivery: Design experiments, analyze results, and identify opportunities to improve product performance and business outcomes.
Data Automation: Automate data extraction and create denormalized tables or data marts to meet business or product requirements.







What You’ll Need

Experience: Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in product analytics, preferably in a fast-paced growth startup. A strong business sense and a data-driven mindset are essential.
Technical Skills: Proficiency in SQL, Python, data visualization, and dashboarding. Familiarity with tools like Tableau, Metabase, Google Data Studio, Clevertap.
Critical Thinking: Ability to transform ambiguous business or product challenges into well-defined analyses and impactful outcomes. Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to design simple, effective experiments.
Work Style: Comfortable working independently with minimal guidance while thriving in a collaborative, team-oriented environment.
Bias for Action: A hustler mindset with a strong bias for action. Ability to manage daily tasks with focus on achieving business goals in a hyper-growth environment.

Show more

criteria.Industries: Food and Beverage Services and Internet Marketplace Platforms
